_fixture_meta.label: negative
_fixture_meta.source: wSOL — standard SPL Token (legacy), Solana mainnet, live-verified 2026-04-21
_fixture_meta.rationale: Wrapped SOL (wSOL) uses the standard SPL Token program (TokenkegQfeZyiNwAJbNbGKPFXCWuBvf9Ss623VQ5DA), NOT Token-2022. TokenMeta.transfer_fee = null. D07 must return Err(InsufficientBaseline) immediately. This fixture tests the most fundamental gate: any non-Token-2022 token (or Token-2022 without TransferFeeConfig) is rejected before any database query. Confirms that D07 does not accidentally query token2022_instructions for 99%+ of the token universe that uses standard SPL.
_fixture_meta.test_assertion: result.is_err() and error is DetectorError::InsufficientBaseline { reason: 'not a Token-2022 mint with TransferFeeConfig' }. Zero events in output. No token2022_instructions query issued.

_d07_expected_output.reason: not a Token-2022 mint with TransferFeeConfig
